message:
refactor(pthread): use let-chains and is_multiple_of for idiomatic Rust

Modernize pthread_abi alignment checks and control flow to use newer
Rust idioms available on nightly:

- Replace manual modulo alignment checks ((ptr as usize) % align != 0)
  with the stabilized is_multiple_of() method for clearer intent
- Flatten nested if-let in pthread_mutex_init using let-chains
  (if attr.is_null() && let Some(word_ptr) = ...) to reduce indentation
  and improve readability

No behavioral changes; all existing pthread tests continue to pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
